name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Intelligence Studio
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What's the current pain point?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature and how it should work.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, or references that help illustrate the idea.
